rationale: Gov't Code §2001.003 is a definitions provision for the Administrative Procedure Act. It has no operative relationship to the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote:
"Rule":
(A) means a state agency statement of general applicability that:
(i) implements, interprets, or prescribes law or policy; or
(ii) describes the procedure or practice requirements of a state agency;
_note: No conflict. The cited rule is a definitional provision governing administrative procedure; it does not address or constrain homestead exemption amounts.
